report.title: Bao cao luan giai Bat Tu

sections.title: Tong quan
sections.content: Nhat chu Canh Kim sinh thang Suu, than can bang, Cach cuc Chinh Quan, Dung Than la Thuy.

sections.title: Tinh cach
sections.content: Tinh cach nghiem tuc, co ky luat, trung thuc va co kha nang lanh dao.

sections.title: Su nghiep
sections.content: Phu hop cac linh vuc quan ly, ky thuat, hanh chinh, tai chinh, phap luat.

sections.title: Tai van
sections.content: Tai van phat trien tot khi van Kim va Thuy duoc kich hoat.

sections.title: Hon nhan
sections.content: Can can bang giua cong viec va gia dinh de tranh xung dot.

sections.title: Suc khoe
sections.content: Nen chu y he ho hap, than va dieu hoa ngu hanh.

report.summary: Tong the la so kha can bang, co tiem nang phat trien ben vung neu di dung Dai Van va Dung Than.
